title: Sprint 54 Wave A: Enhance LlmEvaluatorImpl with build-aware context
description: Enhance LlmEvaluatorImpl.BuildUserMessage to include build-specific diagnostic detail when the goal is an IBuildGoal. Add: build progress (placed/skipped/remaining), recent skip reasons from world facts, per-block facing/direction data from the blueprint. This gives the LLM enough context to make intelligent replan decisions rather than just seeing "place FAIL" outcomes.
